# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

KAFKA_JMX_ENABLED: "true"
KAFKA_JMX_PORT: "9999"
KAFKA_JMX_OPTS: "-Djava.rmi.server.hostname=0.0.0.0"
KAFKA_LISTENER_SECURITY_PROTOCOL_MAP: "PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT"
KAFKA_LISTENERS: "PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092"
KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS: "PLAINTEXT://{your.kafka.broker.ip}:9092"
KAFKA_JMX_SSL: "false"
KAFKA_JMX_AUTHENTICATION: "none"
